name: Dots and Boxes 2
description: Dots and Boxes 2.0 is a modern, feature-rich version of the classic pen-and-paper strategy game where players take turns connecting dots to form squares (boxes). The player who completes the most boxes wins! This version offers multiple ways to play:vs AI Bot: Challenge yourself against three difficulty levels: Normal, Hard, and Expert.Two Players: Enjoy local multiplayer with a friend.The game features a customizable board size up to 20x20, color settings for both players, and a Quick Game option to start with 40% of the lines already filled. The game also includes statistics tracking and is designed with resp
instructions: Mouse Touch Click or tap on an empty space between two dots to draw a line
